# PhishDestroy — NameSilo Investigation

> Authorized defensive security investigation into NameSilo, LLC (IANA #1479), a US-based ICANN-accredited domain registrar. Complete zone scan of 5,269,357 domains. Filed with ICANN Contractual Compliance on March 18, 2026.

## What This Is

This site documents systemic abuse-facilitation by NameSilo, LLC (IANA #1479). Key findings:

- 5,269,357 NameSilo domains scanned — complete zone file census, no sampling
- 87.3% of domains have no legitimate use (parking, phishing, fraud, redirect chains)
- 183,419 confirmed-malicious domains shielded behind NameSilo's own WHOIS privacy service (PrivacyGuardian.org)
- 3,726 brand-phishing domains identified via MurmurHash3 favicon fingerprinting
- 328,230-domain cluster sharing a single server fingerprint (SHA-256 of Server+XPB+ETag headers)
- 129 Trustpilot reviews deleted by NameSilo in 4 months (Jan–May 2026)
- NameSilo and xmrwallet operator both published PR Newswire press releases on the same day (Jan 21–22, 2026)

The anchor case: xmrwallet[.]com — a Monero wallet drainer operating since ~2016, exfiltrating user private keys server-side on every login. Estimated victim losses: $10–20M. NameSilo publicly defended the operator on March 13, 2026, denied receiving 20+ abuse reports, and committed in writing to helping him erase VirusTotal detections.

## Key Pages

- Zone Scan Report: https://phishdestroy.github.io/namesilo-evidence/namesilo-scan.html
- Favicon Cluster Analysis: https://phishdestroy.github.io/namesilo-evidence/namesilo-clusters.html
- 107k IOC Domain List (searchable): https://phishdestroy.github.io/namesilo-evidence/namesilo-domains.html
- PrivacyGuardian Shield (183k malicious): https://phishdestroy.github.io/namesilo-evidence/namesilo-privacyguardian.html
- Review Manipulation & PR Newswire: https://phishdestroy.github.io/namesilo-evidence/namesilo-reviews.html
- Evidence Index: https://phishdestroy.github.io/namesilo-evidence/

## Data Downloads

- Complete zone file (5.27M domains, gzip): https://github.com/phishdestroy/namesilo-evidence/raw/main/pkg/raw_data/1479_full.csv.gz
- Evidence manifest (SHA-256 hashes): https://phishdestroy.github.io/namesilo-evidence/evidence/evidence_manifest.json
- PrivacyGuardian malicious domains (JSON): https://github.com/phishdestroy/namesilo-evidence/raw/main/pkg/evidence/pg_criminal_domains.json

## Key Numbers

- Total domains scanned: 5,269,357
- Junk/abuse rate: 87.3% (4,600,249 domains)
- Phishing domains: 3,726
- Gambling cluster: 19,198
- Server fingerprint cluster: 328,230
- Malicious behind PrivacyGuardian: 183,419
- Hard-confirmed malicious (3+ sources): 109,196
- Brand impersonations: 201
- Dead domain rate: 32.2% (vs 14–21% industry average)
- Abuse reports filed with NameSilo: 20+ (delivery-receipted)
- Other registrars that suspended same domain: 3 (PDR, WebNic, NICENIC)

- Victims: report@phishdestroy.io
- Regulators/press: abuse@phishdestroy.io
